policy.missing_values: Missing EPS, revenue, company name and event time remain null or ticker-only; values are never fabricated
policy.official_override: Company IR / SEC confirmed rows override provider estimates for the same ticker and date
policy.relevance: Portfolio relations are explicit and auditable through data/earnings_relevance.json
